surfaces.context: white modules with one-pixel warm-gray borders
surfaces.message: subtle role tint, six-pixel radius, no drop shadow
surfaces.handoff: coral/20 outer boundary with emerald result and check accents
surfaces.shadow_policy: none except floating menus and responsive context sheet

truth_constraints: Phase grouping is a read-time projection over provider-native and Harness records.
Tool invocation/result pairing preserves access to both native items.
Provider messages, tools, and lifecycle remain native-session reads and are not copied to Harness.
Harness assignment, handoff, correlation, artifacts, and controls remain separately attributable.
Generated runtime metrics absent from the selected MemberRun are omitted rather than invented.

responsive.tablet: context rail becomes a right sheet; main chronology remains the scroll owner
responsive.mobile: single chronology; context becomes a bottom sheet; tool rows use two-line layout
responsive.composer: sticky at all sizes and never covers the last history item
